sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">PLond. = Greek papyri in the British Museum,</title_> vols. i and ii ed. F. G. Kenyon, vol. iii ed. F. G. Kenyon & H. I. Bell, vols. iv and v ed. H. I. Bell, London 1893-; unpublished papyri (<title_ TEIform="title">PLond. ined.</title_>) are cited by inventory No.</item>
